svg.text: Koe COIN v7-LV — nRF54LV10A Direct Battery
20mm round | 3mA BLE | NO LDO for MCU | 1.2–1.7V direct | 150mAh → 50h runtime
20mm | 4-layer | 29 parts | nRF54LV10A BLE 5.4 | LDO bypass for MCU
LDO bypass: MCU runs at 1.2–1.7V direct from LiPo
MIC -> I2S -> nRF54LV10A -> BLE Audio (LC3) / USB
Power: VBAT -> R_BYPASS -> MCU (1.2V) | VBAT -> LDO -> 3.3V peripherals
Q2 2026 — consignment assembly (nRF54LV10A not yet on LCSC)
